intent: Infer conventions from an existing codebase and turn them into reusable instruction rules.
shouldTrigger: Discover the conventions this codebase actually follows.
Infer rules from the code and tell me what should go into CLAUDE.md.
Use /discover to find unwritten project conventions.
What conventions should I add as instruction rules?
shouldNotTrigger: Check whether the current rules are being followed.
Lint my instruction file for quality problems.
smokeWorkflow: User asks for convention mining from the codebase.
Skill samples representative files, compares observed patterns against existing rules, and filters for high-value conventions only.
Skill returns paste-ready rule suggestions with evidence and exceptions.
